mapper.select: select s.id as supplierId, s.name as supplierName, ( select count(1) from purchase_order po where po.supplier_id = s.id and po.deleted = 0 and po.create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) ) as totalOrderCount, ( select count(1) from purchase_order po where po.supplier_id = s.id and po.deleted = 0 and po.status = 'COMPLETED' and po.create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) ) as completedOrderCount, ( select count(1) from purchase_order po where po.supplier_id = s.id and po.deleted = 0 and po.status in ('CANCELLED', 'CLOSED') and po.create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) ) as cancelledOrderCount, ( select count(1) from arrival a left join purchase_order po on a.order_id = po.id where po.supplier_id = s.id and a.deleted = 0 and po.deleted = 0 and a.status = 'ABNORMAL' and a.create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) ) as abnormalArrivalCount, ( select count(1) from arrival a left join purchase_order po on a.order_id = po.id where po.supplier_id = s.id and a.deleted = 0 and po.deleted = 0 and a.create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) ) as totalArrivalCount , ( select ifnull( round( sum(case when po.confirm_time is not null then 1 else 0 end) / nullif(count(1), 0), 4 ), 0 ) from purchase_order po where po.supplier_id = s.id and po.deleted = 0 and po.create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) ) as confirmRate, ( select ifnull( round( sum( case when coalesce(( select sum(poi.order_number) from purchase_order_item poi where poi.order_id = po.id and poi.deleted = 0 ), 0) > 0 and greatest( coalesce(( select sum(poi.arrived_number) from purchase_order_item poi where poi.order_id = po.id and poi.deleted = 0 ), 0), coalesce(( select sum(a.arrival_number) from arrival a where a.order_id = po.id and a.deleted = 0 ), 0) ) >= coalesce(( select sum(poi.order_number) from purchase_order_item poi where poi.order_id = po.id and poi.deleted = 0 ), 0) then 1 else 0 end ) / nullif(count(1), 0), 4 ), 0 ) from purchase_order po where po.supplier_id = s.id and po.deleted = 0 and po.create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) ) as arrivalCompletionRate, ( select ifnull( round( sum( case when coalesce(( select sum(poi.order_number) from purchase_order_item poi where poi.order_id = po.id and poi.deleted = 0 ), 0) > 0 and greatest( coalesce(( select sum(poi.inbound_number) from purchase_order_item poi where poi.order_id = po.id and poi.deleted = 0 ), 0), coalesce(( select sum(i.inbound_number) from inbound i left join arrival a on i.arrival_id = a.id where a.order_id = po.id and i.deleted = 0 and a.deleted = 0 ), 0) ) >= coalesce(( select sum(poi.order_number) from purchase_order_item poi where poi.order_id = po.id and poi.deleted = 0 ), 0) then 1 else 0 end ) / nullif(count(1), 0), 4 ), 0 ) from purchase_order po where po.supplier_id = s.id and po.deleted = 0 and po.create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) ) as inboundCompletionRate from supplier s where s.id = #{supplierId} and s.deleted = 0
